payload.answer: One underlying fact is present; the second delivery is a retry of the same event and should not create a second durable memory.
citations: Input: same Slack event ID delivered twice
payload.decision: Deduplicate duplicate delivery; retain at most one memory record for the underlying event.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID, not a new entity-resolution case.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: No superseding or conflicting fact introduced.
Committed only one durable memory candidate.

repair_options: Store a single fact card and ignore subsequent retries with the same event ID.
If event IDs are not available in the store, use content+timestamp deduplication before committing a new memory.
